core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Replace throwing a RuntimeException when a port reservation fails with silently adding the port to the reserved set to prevent startup failures.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.before: throw new RuntimeException("Unable to reserve previously set port " + property + " for port name " + propertyName);

core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Correct the loop to iterate over the current class in the hierarchy traversal instead of the original class.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the manual RestTemplate bean configuration with an OpenAPI-generated PetApi client bean.
Inject a base URL from configuration properties to configure the API client.
Add SLF4J logger instance for logging client configuration details.
Replace manual RestTemplate usage with a generated OpenAPI client (PetApi) to simplify HTTP interaction and type safety.
Remove imports related to the removed RestTemplate and URI handling logic.
Add imports for the generated Pet API client and models used in the new implementation.
Remove the @Value injection for the URL since the generated client handles configuration internally.
Change the exception type from generic Exception to specific ApiException thrown by the generated client.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.before: public Pet addPet(String name) throws Exception
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.after: public Pet addPet(String name) throws ApiException

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace manual RequestEntity construction with direct object population and API call.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with modern Spring Framework standards.
Simplify Mockito stubbing by using static import for any() and removing redundant parentheses around the method call.
Explicitly specify the path attribute in the @MockEndpoint annotation to ensure correct endpoint mapping.
Update imports to use static imports for matchers and adjust package references for model classes.
Add new test cases and improve existing ones to verify mock interactions and exception handling.
Specify the base path for the mocked endpoint to align with updated API routing or framework requirements.
